workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Angela Doyle at Contoso Ltd just sent this. Help me create the summary.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-26 12:16 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Contoso Ltd renewal risk

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 12:05 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Contoso Ltd: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-D trap (MSX writeback proposed without evidence in thread); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-D failure mode (MSX writeback proposed without evidence in thread)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-D -- MSX writeback proposed without evidence in thread
